title: Imu Steps Out from the Empty Throne
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Sabo, Unknown person #8, Dragon, Unknown person #9, Cobra as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I finally know the path arabasta must follow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you both have D. In your name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is that just a coincidence or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who cares? A name's a name!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you want a 'D.' In your name, sabo?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Da Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: “FLY THE FLAG THAT HERALDS TH WORLD’S EVENTUAL DAWN.”

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never liked him, but how can I celebrate after witnessing something so terrifying?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cobra the Senile has gone and got himself killed...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I've stumbled upon the biggest skeleton...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even wanna know who that was....!!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
